evaluated_agents.name: Claude Opus 4.8
evaluated_agents.main_failure: token-scoped cache eviction leaves a stale allow after transitive role revocation (revoked link shares no token with the affected request key)
evaluated_agents.unsafe_rate: 1/3 runs (opus_a unsafe; opus_b and opus_c safe)

evaluated_agents.name: Claude Haiku 4.5
evaluated_agents.main_failure: subject-scoped cache eviction leaves a stale allow after a role's permission is revoked and after role revocation (inherited access)

note: evaluated_agents entries are finalized from the calibration runs recorded in calibration/calibration.md and reference_solutions/. Only Claude Opus 4.8 and Claude Haiku 4.5 were run; no other agents are claimed.
